line_style: 锐利硬边+发光描边,1-2px主线条+glow效果
render: 数字厚涂+霓虹发光,neon-glow texture
lighting: 霓虹光源+全息投影+体积光,高饱和发光
prompt_keywords: Cyberpunk neon future style, high-saturation magenta and cyan neon glow, holographic advertisements, rain-slicked streets, dystopian atmosphere, digital glitch effects, chrome and glass surfaces
negative_keywords: ancient mansion, traditional architecture, natural landscape, historical, rural, bright daylight, pastel, watercolor

fp_examples.action: 黑客在霓虹闪烁的街道潜行,全息广告环绕
黑客接入数据终端,AI全息投影出现对峙
黑客与特工在楼顶对决,无人机盘旋
黑客驾驶飞行摩托冲出城市,霓虹渐远

prompt_example: A lone hacker navigates a neon-drenched alleyway at midnight, holographic advertisements flickering across rain-slicked pavement, the hacker clutching a modified datapad with cybernetic fingers, shot in a moody wide angle from eye level with rule of thirds composition, cyberpunk atmosphere with saturated magenta and cyan neon glow --ar 2:3 --s 750 --style raw --no text
style_constraint_cn:
【风格强制约束】当前风格: 赛博朋克·霓虹未来
✅ 允许场景: 霓虹街道/数据港/摩天楼/飞行器 (从故事原文提取)
❌ 禁止场景: 古宅/传统建筑/自然田园/历史场景
❌ 禁止照抄: 不要用'雨夜古宅',必须用赛博朋克场景
氛围: 压抑迷幻,霓虹高饱和
style_constraint_en: IMPORTANT: Extract scenes from the story content. Use cyberpunk scenes (neon streets, data hubs, skyscrapers). Do NOT use ancient mansions, traditional buildings, or natural landscapes. Adapt to the story's actual setting in a cyberpunk context.
meta_prompt: Cyberpunk neon future, high-saturation magenta and cyan glow, holographic elements, rain-slicked surfaces, dystopian atmosphere, chrome and glass

cognitive_level.reader_profile: 科技探索者·沉浸赛博世界
cognitive_level.content_adaptation: 进阶技术概念可视化, 需读者有数字文化基础

reader_constraint.reader_state: 科技爱好者·渴望未来感冲击
reader_constraint.reader_expectation: 霓虹光影+赛博朋克叙事+高密度信息层叠

visual_frequency.HF: 霓虹招牌/全息投影/雨夜反光(高频视觉锚点)
visual_frequency.MF: 建筑轮廓/人物剪影/机械细节(中频叙事支撑)
visual_frequency.LF: 远景雾霭/天空渐变/背景虚化(低频氛围底色)
visual_frequency.progression: HF密集分布前1/3画面抓眼球, MF中段叙事, LF底部收束氛围
